violations.text: Molluscan shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the food storage area. No foods/food equipment observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Areas of droppings are to be properly cleaned and sanitized in order to check for new activity. Establishment is to increase pest control as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

Beverage tubing was observed in contact with ice used for drinks at the bar. Beverage tubing and cold plate beverage cooling devices must not be in contact with stored ice used for food/drinks. Beverage tubing must be separated from ice used for food/drinks. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets of the 4-door reach-in were observed in poor repair, split away from the doors. Gaskets are to be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2025
Ventilation hood at the cook/grill line observed with a large amount of dust/debris. Per PIC, hood cleaning is scheduled for Tuesday, April 22, 2025. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2025

A hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by several mops. Another handwashing sink was blocked by a dish rack. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

Shellstock (clams) located in the inside walk-in cooler did not have the proper identification tags. All other shellstock tags were with the product. Shellstock tags must remain attached to the container in which the shellstock are received until the container is empty. Tag must then be dated, filed chronologically, and retained for 90 days. Clams were voluntarily disposed of during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

ROP tuna was observed thawing in the walk-in cooler without being opened. Temperature of product observed at 37 degrees F. Packages were cut open during inspection to thaw properly. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings observed in the dry storage area. No foods observed to be contaminated. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment does have active pest control. All droppings are to be removed and shelving cleaned and sanitized. If new droppings are observed, pest control service must be increased to resolve the issue. New Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Refrigerator door gasket of the 4-door reach-in observed in poor repair, splitting away from the door. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/23/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/09/2024
Leak observed from the ceiling at the cook/grill line. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Leak is to be properly repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine, deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of black/brown residues (ice machine) and dried food and debris (deli slicer). The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023

Bread and food service products were observed stored on the floor in the storage area, and boxes of foods stored on the floor of the walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
Soda dispensing hoses at the bar observed in the same ice that is used for beverages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2023
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2023
